ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of residence */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of residence */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of residence */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the patient record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the patient record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_history" (
  "medical_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical history entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the entry belongs to */,
  "family_diabetes" TEXT /* Family history of diabetes */,
  "highBP" TEXT /* Presence of high blood pressure */,
  "physically_active" TEXT /* Level of physical activity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the medical history entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the medical history entry was last updated */,
  "family_cancer" TEXT /* Family history of cancer */,
  "family_heart_disease" TEXT /* Family history of heart disease */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Known allergies */,
  "surgical_history" TEXT /* Surgical history */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medical_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_history_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lifestyle" (
  "lifestyle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lifestyle entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the entry belongs to */,
  "bmi" REAL /* Body Mass Index (BMI) of the patient */,
  "smoking" TEXT /* Smoking habits of the patient */,
  "alcohol" TEXT /* Alcohol consumption habits of the patient */,
  "sleep" INTEGER /* Average hours of sleep per night */,
  "sound_sleep" INTEGER /* Average hours of sound sleep per night */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the lifestyle entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the lifestyle entry was last updated */,
  "diet_type" TEXT /* Type of diet */,
  "exercise_type" TEXT /* Type of exercise */,
  "mental_health" TEXT /* Mental health status */,
  "social_activity" TEXT /* Frequency of social activities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lifestyle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lifestyle_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diabetes" (
  "diabetes_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diabetes entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the entry belongs to */,
  "pregnancies" INTEGER /* Number of pregnancies */,
  "diabetes" TEXT /* Presence of diabetes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the diabetes entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the diabetes entry was last updated */,
  "diabetes_type" TEXT /* Type of diabetes */,
  "insulin_usage" TEXT /* Usage of insulin */,
  "glucose_level" REAL /* Average glucose level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diabetes_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diabetes_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blood_pressure" (
  "blood_pressure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each blood pressure entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the entry belongs to */,
  "bp_level" TEXT /* Blood pressure level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the blood pressure entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the blood pressure entry was last updated */,
  "systolic_bp" INTEGER /* Systolic blood pressure */,
  "diastolic_bp" INTEGER /* Diastolic blood pressure */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date of the blood pressure measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("blood_pressure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blood_pressure_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medication" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the entry belongs to */,
  "regular_medicine" TEXT /* Regular medication taken by the patient */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the medication entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the medication entry was last updated */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the medication */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the medication */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the medication */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the medication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medication_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nutrition" (
  "nutrition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nutrition entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the entry belongs to */,
  "junk_food" TEXT /* Frequency of junk food consumption */,
  "stress" TEXT /* Level of stress */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the nutrition entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the nutrition entry was last updated */,
  "caloric_intake" REAL /* Average daily caloric intake */,
  "protein_intake" REAL /* Average daily protein intake */,
  "carbohydrate_intake" REAL /* Average daily carbohydrate intake */,
  "fat_intake" REAL /* Average daily fat intake */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nutrition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nutrition_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "urination" (
  "urination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each urination entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the entry belongs to */,
  "urination_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of urination */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the urination entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the urination entry was last updated */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date of the urination measurement */,
  "urination_color" TEXT /* Color of the urine */,
  "urination_clarity" TEXT /* Clarity of the urine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("urination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_urination_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., healthcare professional, researcher, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the patient data */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the data belongs to */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access log entry was created */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
